creator: rodrigc@crodrigues.org
text:
On Tue, May 29, 2007 at 05:19:44AM +0000, Jan Rochel wrote:
> 	root:~> ls -ld /dev/acd0 /mnt/cd
> 	crw-r-----  1 root  operator    0,  60 May 28 16:57 /dev/acd0
> 	drwxr-xr-x  2 root  operator       512 May 24 01:32 /mnt/cd
> 	root:~> mount -rt cd9660 /dev/acd0 /mnt/cd
> 	mount_cd9660: /dev/acd0: No such file or directory


Hi,

What is the output of:

file - < /dev/acd0

-- 
Craig Rodrigues        
rodrigc@crodrigues.org
